description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Define a pages job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch. The job should execute the exact shell commands: apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -qq nodejs, bundle install -j4, bundle exec rake generate, mv public .public, and mv .public/octopress public. Publish the resulting public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No services, caches, or extra variables are required.
